(9) IntTRSNonPeriodicNontermProof (COMPLETE)
Normalized system to the following form:
f(pc, v1374:0, v1377:0) -> f(1, v1374:0, 1 + v1377:0) :|: pc = 1 && (v1377:0 > 0 && v1374:0 + 4 * v1377:0 > 4)
Proved unsatisfiability of the following formula, indicating that the system is never left after entering:
(((run2_0 = ((1 * 1)) and run2_1 = ((run1_1 * 1)) and run2_2 = ((1 * 1) + (run1_2 * 1))) and (((run1_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and (((run1_2 * 1)) > 0 and ((run1_1 * 1) + (run1_2 * 4)) > ((1 * 4))))) and !(((run2_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and (((run2_2 * 1)) > 0 and ((run2_1 * 1) + (run2_2 * 4)) > ((1 * 4)))))
Proved satisfiability of the following formula, indicating that the system is entered at least once:
((run2_0 = ((1 * 1)) and run2_1 = ((run1_1 * 1)) and run2_2 = ((1 * 1) + (run1_2 * 1))) and (((run1_0 * 1)) = ((1 * 1)) and (((run1_2 * 1)) > 0 and ((run1_1 * 1) + (run1_2 * 4)) > ((1 * 4)))))

(23) SEGraph to IRS (SOUND)
Transformed LLVM symbolic execution graph SCC into a rewrite problem. Log: 
Generated rules. Obtained 210 rulesP rules:
